name: pre-mortem
description: Evaluations for pre-mortem skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user imagines project failure to identify hidden risks before launch

prompts.input: 事前验尸分析：假设这个项目失败了，可能原因是什么？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '事前验尸' (pre-mortem) + failure assumption

prompts.input: Before we ship, imagine this product failed miserably. What went wrong?
Premortem 分析：今天是 3 个月后，这个功能彻底失败了
假设失败了，工程、人员、流程、外部因素各方面可能出了什么问题？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '假设失败' (imagine failure) + multi-dimensional analysis

prompts.input: 发布前检查：这个项目有什么隐藏风险可能导致失败？
prompts.reason: Chinese context: '发布前检查' (launch readiness) + hidden risk identification

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for post-failure analysis, simple troubleshooting, or success planning

prompts.input: Why did the last launch fail? Let's analyze what happened
prompts.reason: Post-failure analysis should trigger five-whys for root cause, not pre-mortem

prompts.input: 这个 bug 怎么修复？
prompts.reason: Simple technical troubleshooting, not risk assessment

prompts.input: How should we celebrate this successful project launch?
prompts.reason: Success planning, not failure scenario analysis
